title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol, GPT-5.6 Terra, and GPT-5.6 Luna now available as Databricks-hosted models
body:
Model Serving now supports OpenAI [GPT-5.6 Sol](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-6-sol), [GPT-5.6 Terra](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-6-terra), and [GPT-5.6 Luna](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-6-luna) as Databricks-hosted models. You can access these models using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).

Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with [applicable terms](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/acceptable-use-models).
